_note: SILORA ORIENT — 4 Series Catalog (legacy data file, kept for reference). Active data is in collections.json.

_series_overview.orchid: 兰花系列 — The special flower. Orchid's unique silhouette, 9 colorways.
_series_overview.seasons: 四时之景 — Four Seasons. Spring/Summer/Autumn/Winter poetry pieces.
_series_overview.kinship: 亲情系列 — Family bonds. Three generations, mother-daughter, custom gifts.
_series_overview.custom: 定制系列 — Bespoke. Choose flower → color → jewel → tell your story.

collections.name: Phalaenopsis — Nine Colorways
collections.subtitle: The orchid was chosen for one reason: no other flower has this silhouette.
collections.subtitle_zh: 选择兰花，只因没有任何花拥有这样的花型。
collections.tag_zh: 兰花系列 · 特别的花
collections.price: 耳钉 $79/pr · 耳挂 $60 · 戒指/挂坠 from $80

collections.name: Lily in Moonlight
collections.subtitle: White silk with blue-ombre edges. Amber and jade. Spring moonlight.
collections.subtitle_zh: 白色蚕丝渐染蓝边，琥珀珠与玉珠，春夜月光的流光感。
collections.poetry: 「若非群玉山头见，会向瑶台月下逢。」— Du Fu

collections.name: Lotus Rising
collections.subtitle: Pale green and blush-white petals, frozen mid-rise. Freshwater pearls and jade.
collections.subtitle_zh: 淡绿与藕白花瓣，凝固于上升一息之间。淡水珍珠与翡翠珠。
collections.poetry: 「水面清圆，一一风荷举。」— Zhou Bangyan

collections.name: Osmanthus in Gold
collections.subtitle: Gold osmanthus clusters, deep olive leaves. Autumn made wearable.
collections.subtitle_zh: 金黄桂花簇，墨绿金边叶，可佩戴的秋天。
collections.poetry: 「月桂流金」— Featured CCTV Spring Festival Gala 2026

collections.name: Crystal Curtain
collections.subtitle: A Li Bai poem in silk and crystal. A still winter night.
collections.subtitle_zh: 李白诗意，以丝绸与水晶重现。静冬夜色。
collections.poetry: 「却下水晶帘，玲珑望秋月。」— Li Bai

collections.name: Kinship — Tell Us Your Story
collections.name_zh: 亲情系列 · 三代的故事
collections.subtitle: Three generations. A grandmother's hands, a daughter's eyes.
collections.subtitle_zh: 告诉我们三代人的故事。
collections._note: Publish when founder provides story and image

collections.name: Bespoke — Begin with the Flower
collections.name_zh: 定制系列 · 先选花形，再选颜色
collections.subtitle: Choose your flower. Then its color. Then its jewels. Then tell us your story.
collections.subtitle_zh: 选择花形，再选颜色，再选珠宝，最后告诉我们你的故事。
